pkg/kafka.purpose: Shared low-level Kafka infrastructure: typed config-param structs that compile to confluent-kafka-go kafka.ConfigMap, a TopicProvisioner with an expirable LRU cache, librdkafka log bridging to slog, and an OTel metrics sub-package. Primary constraint: pure infrastructure plumbing — no domain or business logic.

patterns.name: ConfigMapper + ConfigValidator interfaces on every param struct
patterns.description: Each param struct (CommonConfigParams, ConsumerConfigParams, ProducerConfigParams) implements both AsConfigMap() (kafka.ConfigMap, error) and Validate() error. Composite configs (ConsumerConfig, ProducerConfig, AdminConfig) embed the param structs and delegate via mergeConfigsToMap + a sequential validator loop.
patterns.example:
type ConsumerConfig struct { CommonConfigParams; ConsumerConfigParams }
func (c ConsumerConfig) AsConfigMap() (kafka.ConfigMap, error) { return mergeConfigsToMap(c.CommonConfigParams, c.ConsumerConfigParams) }

patterns.name: configValue interface for string enums
patterns.description: Every string-based enum (BrokerAddressFamily, Partitioner, AutoOffsetReset, TimeDurationMilliSeconds) implements fmt.Stringer + encoding.TextUnmarshaler + json.Unmarshaler. Validation uses a ValidValues[T] slice with AsKeyMap() for O(1) lookup, or slices.Contains.

patterns.name: TimeDurationMilliSeconds renders as a millisecond integer string
patterns.description: TimeDurationMilliSeconds.String() returns the duration in milliseconds as a decimal string (e.g. '6000' for 6s) — the format librdkafka expects for *.ms keys. Never pass a raw time.Duration as a kafka.ConfigMap value for *.ms config keys.

patterns.name: localhost auto-forces BrokerAddressFamilyIPv4
patterns.description: CommonConfigParams.AsConfigMap sets broker.address.family to IPv4 when BrokerAddressFamily is empty and Brokers contains 'localhost' or '127.0.0.1' (OSX IPv6 resolver workaround). Do not override or remove this branch.
patterns.example: } else if strings.Contains(c.Brokers, "localhost") || strings.Contains(c.Brokers, "127.0.0.1") { m.SetKey("broker.address.family", BrokerAddressFamilyIPv4) }

patterns.name: metadata.max.age.ms always 3x TopicMetadataRefreshInterval
patterns.description: When TopicMetadataRefreshInterval is non-zero, AsConfigMap also sets metadata.max.age.ms to 3x that value so the metadata cache never expires before a refresh. Never set metadata.max.age.ms independently.

patterns.name: TopicProvisioner LRU cache + noop + error-as-success
patterns.description: topicProvisioner skips cache-hit topics in Provision and ProtectedTopics in DeProvision; ErrTopicAlreadyExists (provision) and ErrUnknownTopicOrPart (de-provision) are treated as success alongside ErrNoError. NewTopicProvisioner validates AdminClient/Logger/Meter (nil checks, fail-fast) before registering OTel metrics.
patterns.example: switch result.Error.Code() { case kafka.ErrNoError, kafka.ErrTopicAlreadyExists: _ = p.cache.Add(result.Topic, struct{}{}) }

patterns.name: LogProcessor as an oklog/run-compatible pair
patterns.description: LogProcessor returns (execute func() error, interrupt func(error)) for run.Group; ConsumeLogChannel is the goroutine variant. Both require go.logs.channel.enable=true, which ConsumerConfigParams and ProducerConfigParams hardcode in AsConfigMap.
patterns.example: func LogProcessor(logEmitter LogEmitter, logger *slog.Logger) (execute func() error, interrupt func(error))

key_file_guides.role: All Kafka config param structs (Common/Consumer/Producer/Admin) with ConfigMapper/ConfigValidator impls, string-enum types, ValidValues[T], and mergeConfigsToMap.
key_file_guides.watch_for: localhost/127.0.0.1 auto-forces IPv4 when BrokerAddressFamily is empty. Cooperative and eager PartitionAssignmentStrategy values must not be mixed — Validate() rejects this. StatsInterval min is 5s, TopicMetadataRefreshInterval min is 10s.

key_file_guides.role: TopicProvisioner interface + expirable-LRU-cached topicProvisioner + TopicProvisionerNoop. Provisions/de-provisions topics via AdminClient with OTel metrics.
key_file_guides.watch_for: ProtectedTopics must list every system topic to prevent accidental deletion. evictCallback uses a fresh context.WithTimeout(3s) — never the caller ctx. ErrTopicAlreadyExists and ErrUnknownTopicOrPart must remain success cases.

key_file_guides.role: Bridges librdkafka syslog-level integers to slog.Level (mapLogLevel); exposes LogProcessor (oklog/run pair) and ConsumeLogChannel (goroutine variant).
key_file_guides.watch_for: go.logs.channel.enable (and go.application.rebalance.enable in the consumer) are hardcoded in AsConfigMap — removing them silently drops librdkafka logs.

key_file_guides.role: Package declaration only — intentionally empty aside from the package doc comment.
key_file_guides.watch_for: No init() or global state; keep it that way.

anti_patterns: Setting kafka.ConfigMap keys directly instead of through AsConfigMap/mergeConfigsToMap — bypasses validation and the localhost IPv4 auto-fix
Passing a raw time.Duration as a kafka.ConfigMap value for *.ms keys — must use TimeDurationMilliSeconds which renders as a millisecond integer string
Setting metadata.max.age.ms independently instead of tying it to 3x TopicMetadataRefreshInterval — causes premature metadata cache expiry
Mixing cooperative and eager PartitionAssignmentStrategy values in ConsumerConfigParams — Validate() explicitly rejects this combination
Using Int64Counter or Histogram for librdkafka-derived stats in metrics/ — they are rolling-window point-in-time snapshots; only Int64Gauge is correct

decisions.decision: ConfigMapper + ConfigValidator split into separate interfaces implemented by value receivers
decisions.rationale: Composite configs embed multiple param structs; mergeConfigsToMap iterates them independently so each part owns its own key namespace and validation without coordinating with others.

decisions.decision: TopicProvisioner uses an expirable LRU cache keyed by topic name
decisions.rationale: Provision is called on every namespace creation; the cache prevents redundant Kafka admin round-trips for already-existing topics, while TTL expiry avoids stale entries after broker-side topic deletion.

decisions.decision: OTel stats metrics live in a separate metrics/ sub-package behind functional options
decisions.rationale: Not all consumers of pkg/kafka need stats instrumentation; separating it avoids pulling OTel metric dependencies into the base config package and lets callers opt in per sub-metric category.

code_examples.scenario: Construct and validate a ConsumerConfig then provision a topic
